# General Coherence Dashboard

This dashboard displays metrics from the coherence analysis across different papers and concepts in the vault.

---

## Run Analysis

Click the link below to run the analysis script. The results on this page will update automatically after the script finishes.

**Run Script:** [Execute Coherence Analysis](file:///D:/THEOPHYSICS_MASTER/00_VAULT_SYSTEM/Scripts/Data/Source/Theophysics_Assets/Scripts/run_coherence_analysis.bat)

---

## Results

```dataviewjs
// This script reads the JSON file generated by the analyze_coherence.py script.
const path = "Theophysics_Assets/Dashboards/coherence_analysis_results.json";

const content = await dv.io.load(path);

if (content) {
    const data = JSON.parse(content);

    dv.header(2, "Coherence Metrics");
    dv.paragraph(`**Average Coherence:** ${data.average_coherence}`);
    dv.paragraph(`**Last Run:** ${data.last_run}`);
    
    dv.header(3, "Least Coherent Pair");
    dv.paragraph(data.least_coherent_pair.join(" & "));

    dv.header(3, "Coherence Matrix");
    const matrix = data.coherence_matrix;
    const headers = [" ", ...Object.keys(matrix)];
    const tableData = Object.keys(matrix).map(rowKey => {
        const row = [rowKey];
        Object.keys(matrix).forEach(colKey => {
            row.push(matrix[rowKey][colKey]);
        });
        return row;
    });

    dv.table(headers, tableData);

} else {
    dv.paragraph("Could not load analysis results. Run the script to generate the data file.");
}
```
